title: NRMA Jindabyne Holiday Park
description: Down-to-earth cabins on a lakefront property offering kitchens, plus a campsite & a caravan park.
hotelDescription:
Set on the shore of Lake Jindabyne, these cozy holiday cabins are also 20 km from the scenic Kosciuszko National Park and 30 km from skiing at Smiggin Holes.
 Streamlined studios to 2-bedroom cabins sleep between 4-6 people and come with kitchens, balconies and flat-screen TVs. Some cabins add air-conditioning, lake views and wood-panelling.
 There's an expansive lawn area near the lake, as well as a campsite and a caravan park on the premises.

title: Kosciuszko Tourist Park
description: Straightforward, rustic chalets & wood cabins, some with BBQs & decks, plus a guest lounge.
hotelDescription:
Surrounded by forest, this collection of simple chalets and cabins in Kosciuszko National Park is 6 km from Creel Bay and 18 km from Perisher ski resort.
 No-nonsense wood cabins have kitchenettes, shared bathrooms and fire pits. The modestly furnished chalets with en suite facilities offer 2 or 3 bedrooms, kitchens and flat-screen TVs; some add bunk beds, BBQ grills and/or decks.
 Amenities include a communal kitchen, and a guest lounge with a log fire. A campground is on-site.

title: Discovery Parks - Jindabyne
description: Basic bunk rooms & modest cabins at a rural pick offering activities such as fishing and boat hire.
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Lake Jindabyne, this relaxed holiday park is 4 km from Jindabyne Airport and 6 km from the edge of Kosciuszko National Park.
 Simple dorms come with bunk beds and shared bathrooms. There are also basic open-plan cabins with beds, bunk beds, kitchenettes and flat-screen TVs. Some offer air-conditioning, and upgraded options feature whirlpool tubs.
 Grounds include BBQ facilities, boat ramps and hire, a playground and tennis courts. There's also a game room, a convenience store, a sauna and a communal whirlpool tub. Activities include fishing, mountain biking, white-water rafting, horse riding and winter skiing.

title: Thredbo Diggings campground
address: Bullocks Walking Track, Bullocks Flat NSW 2627, Australia

title: Rainbow Pines Tourist Caravan Park
address: Lucas St, Old Adaminaby NSW 2629, Australia

title: Adventist Alpine Village
description: Informal lodge set on bushland offering tennis, volleyball & basketball courts, plus BBQs.
hotelDescription:
Set on bushland, this laid-back lodge is 2 km from Barry Way Road, 14 km from Lake Jindabyne and 35 km from ski lifts at Perisher Ski Resort.
 Casual rooms offer bunk beds and en suite bathrooms, plus access to a communal kitchen. Upgraded quarters add minifridges, sitting areas and/or kitchenettes. The 1- and 2-bedroom cabins have flat-screen TVs, separate living areas, kitchens and terraces.
 Amenities include tennis, volleyball and basketball courts, plus BBQs and a playground. There's also a coin-operated laundry and a campsite. Minimum-stay rules may apply.
